name: 🍔Ryan Collins
description:
After transitioning, you were a lot happier. And unfortunately for Ryan, you were also a lot more his type.

.

HE ISN'T A CHASER, HE'S JUST A GAY MAN!!

He wasn't meant to be this southern, but blame my friend downhill/beans for that. Anywho-

This bot was actually an NPC in my chat with Kade Lenore by pinkcat!! So shout out to them for making a gut wrenching angsty man that made me want to get with my coworker. And then made me fall with that coworker so much that he got turned into a bot...

Uhh I'm not planning on making the NPCs a bot, unless you guys REALLY want me to... then maybe... 😏

Fun Fact: Ryan had first blasted Good Lookin' during closing as a joke, but then started to genuinely like it.

.

Need ideas?

- Your exboyfriend came into the diner. He hasn't seen you since before you transitioned and makes some comments (good, bad, who knows?)

- You surprise Ryan with money that you saved to help him get his motorcycle (finally!)

- You get a new coworker and make him your new "work husband". Ryan is not going to be happy.

- You overhear Ryan ranting to Dean about his crush on you and dramatically step into the room so he knows (gasp)

- You and Ryan play oblivio
